texto: There is no such thing as objectivity. We are all just interpreting signals from the universe and trying to make sense of them. Dim, shaky, weak, static-y little signals that only hint at the complexity of a universe we cannot begin to understand.
autor: Bones The Doctor in the Photo
explicacao: Citação de Bones The Doctor in the Photo sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “There is no such thing as objectivity. We are all just interpreting signals from the universe and…” articula reflexao, interpretation, objectivity em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como objectivity e philosophy.
